MANUFACTURER SALES REPRESENTATION  • DME • HME • PHARMACY

Connecting 12 Manufacturers to 300+ Dealers Across Southern Ohio, Southern Indiana, Kentucky, Tennessee & Georgia.

Since 2016, HomeCare Provider Services has provided strategic manufacturers’ representation throughout the healthcare industry. We help introduce and promote innovative products, programs, and solutions to high-value HME providers, DME dealers, pharmacies, and other healthcare organizations serving patients every day.

Our approach is built around service, strong relationships, and practical solutions. By connecting manufacturers with the right customers and supporting providers with responsive, knowledgeable representation, we help create sustainable growth and better outcomes for manufacturers, healthcare partners, and the patients they serve.

Innovative Products. Showroom Solutions. Simplified Ordering.

Strong Manufacturer Partnerships. Innovative Products. Better Solutions for Dealers.

HomeCare Provider Services is the authorized sales representative for the manufacturers listed below. We carefully select innovative products and programs that help expand your product offerings, strengthen your showroom, and provide greater value to your customers.

Our team also develops practical merchandising and sales solutions to help your staff present products more effectively. With dedicated support and convenient online ordering platforms, we make it easier to review products, access dealer pricing, and place orders with our manufacturer partners.

Advanced power recliners and mobility

Golden Technologies

A Premium Line of Advanced Power Recliners, Lift Chairs, Mobility Scooters, Power Wheelchairs, and Hi-Low Beds from One of the Industry’s Leading Manufacturers..

Why you should Offer Golden →

home accessibility Solutions

Access4U

American-Made Modular Ramping Systems Engineered for Fast Installation, Long-Term Durability, and Reliable Accessibility—Complemented by a Full Line of Portable Ramps, Threshold Ramps, Transition Solutions, and Retail Displays.

Why you should Offer Access4u →

hme & DME and Aids to daily living

What Dealers Are Saying

Real stories from real partners.

Trusted Products. Exceptional Service. Real Value. See Why Our Customers Choose HomeCare Provider Services.

“Great patient lift from Climbing Steps — the most innovative product in its category. Instant success for our customers.”

Jason Miller Sales Manager

“Absolutely love the new PR447 Rhea with Twilight from Golden. This advanced power recliner, plus the merchandizing campaign and signage HCPS offers, has increased our sales and given us a great product we feel good about talking about. Thank you, Angelo.”

Emily Sanders Retail Director

“We began using Access4U Modular Ramping and we are blown away with the assembly and how much more robust the frame is. We save hours on installation, and Angelo provided great training for our installers and sales team.”

Marcus Green Home Mod Director

“Angelo helped pick the best products for our bracing section and set up a great shipping program for our pharmacy. It looks and feels like a new store.”

Rachel Adams Retail Manager

“We're a new Golden Technologies dealer and Angelo came in to help us build a great showroom, and helped us discuss the Golden products so much more knowledgeably. Great job, and appreciate you.”

Jim Christy VP of Marketing
